title: Growth Tracker
description: Discord bot and web panel. Tracks guild growth over time and displays trend data in graphical form. Leverages 3rd party Discord OAuth 2.0 workflow and API to enrich user experience. Frontend built on React and backend on Django. Integrated asynchronous discord.py with synchronous Django views.

title: Quick Grades
description: Grades storage and calculator app. Offers full CRUD functionality and displays statistics by course name.

title: httpserver
description: A multithreaded HTTP server implemented from scratch using UNIX sys/socket API for C. Serves static or dynamic HTML. Easily integrated with React through JSON RESTful API.
